positive.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!

7. ! [X0,X1] : ~(mountain_range(X0) & in_location(X0,texas) & mine(X1) & in_location(X1,X0) & donated(X1)) [input(axiom)]
8. ? [X0] : (mountain_range(X0) & in_location(X0,new_mexico) & visited(juan_de_onate,X0)) [input(conjecture)]
9. ~? [X0] : (mountain_range(X0) & in_location(X0,new_mexico) & visited(juan_de_onate,X0)) [negated conjecture 8]
10. ! [X0,X1] : (~mountain_range(X0) | ~in_location(X0,texas) | ~mine(X1) | ~in_location(X1,X0) | ~donated(X1)) [ennf transformation 7]
11. ! [X0] : (~mountain_range(X0) | ~in_location(X0,new_mexico) | ~visited(juan_de_onate,X0)) [ennf transformation 9]
12. mountain_range(picuris_mountains) [cnf transformation 1]
13. in_location(picuris_mountains,new_mexico) | in_location(picuris_mountains,texas) [cnf transformation 2]
14. visited(juan_de_onate,picuris_mountains) [cnf transformation 3]
15. mine(harding_pegmatite_mine) [cnf transformation 4]
16. in_location(harding_pegmatite_mine,picuris_mountains) [cnf transformation 5]
17. donated(harding_pegmatite_mine) [cnf transformation 6]
18. ~in_location(X1,X0) | ~in_location(X0,texas) | ~mine(X1) | ~mountain_range(X0) | ~donated(X1) [cnf transformation 10]
19. ~visited(juan_de_onate,X0) | ~in_location(X0,new_mexico) | ~mountain_range(X0) [cnf transformation 11]
21. 1 <=> in_location(picuris_mountains,texas) [avatar definition]
23. in_location(picuris_mountains,texas) <- (1) [avatar component clause 21]
25. 2 <=> in_location(picuris_mountains,new_mexico) [avatar definition]
27. in_location(picuris_mountains,new_mexico) <- (2) [avatar component clause 25]
28. 1 | 2 [avatar split clause 13,25,21]
29. ~in_location(picuris_mountains,new_mexico) | ~mountain_range(picuris_mountains) [resolution 14,19]
30. ~mountain_range(picuris_mountains) <- (2) [forward subsumption resolution 29,27]
31. $false <- (2) [forward subsumption resolution 30,12]
32. ~2 [avatar contradiction clause 31]
33. ~in_location(picuris_mountains,texas) | ~mine(harding_pegmatite_mine) | ~mountain_range(picuris_mountains) | ~donated(harding_pegmatite_mine) [resolution 18,16]
52. ~mine(harding_pegmatite_mine) | ~mountain_range(picuris_mountains) | ~donated(harding_pegmatite_mine) <- (1) [forward subsumption resolution 33,23]
53. ~mountain_range(picuris_mountains) | ~donated(harding_pegmatite_mine) <- (1) [forward subsumption resolution 52,15]
54. ~donated(harding_pegmatite_mine) <- (1) [forward subsumption resolution 53,12]
55. $false <- (1) [forward subsumption resolution 54,17]
56. ~1 [avatar contradiction clause 55]
s1. 1 | 2 [sat_conversion 28]
s2. ~2 [sat_conversion 32]
s4. ~1 [sat_conversion 56]
s5. # [rat s1,s2,s4]
57. $false [avatar sat refutation s5]
% SZS output end Proof for picuris_pos
% Termination reason: Refutation
